design_philosophy: A premium gamified upskilling platform. The interface should feel like a high-end fintech app mixed with engaging gaming elements. Dark mode provides the canvas, while the vibrant brand gradients create focus, hierarchy, and a sense of reward.

impact_points.usage: Exclusive to Impact Points and rare/premium rewards. MUST include a surrounding glow effect.

xp_points.usage: Used for daily Learning XP, standard progress bars, and common gamification elements.

premium_surface.usage: Used for featured cards and premium UI containers.

bottom_tabs.active_indicator: A glowing dot or short line under the active icon using the neon pink/violet gradient

badges.knowledge: Tier-based colors. L1-L5 (Explorer) uses Light Blue, L6-L15 (Challenger) uses Medium Blue, L16-30 (Expert) uses Violet, 31-50 (Mentor) uses Neon Pink.
badges.rare: Animated or glowing border with Impact Points gradient.

universal_rules.header: Logo MUST appear centered in the top header of ALL 4 screens.
universal_rules.mascot: Mascot MUST appear on EVERY screen fulfilling its specific functional role.

home_dashboard.header_elements: Centered Logo. On the right, Mascot (Happy/Trophy pose) celebrating progress next to a Streak Counter (Flame icon).
home_dashboard.user_section: Greeting: 'Hello, Paco Ramirez'. Subtitle: 'Operations Finance, Netherlands'.
home_dashboard.points_overview: Split view. Left side: Learning XP Progress Bar (out of 120 daily cap) styled with light blue gradient. Right side: Impact Points styled with premium Pink/Violet gradient and an outer glow to look significantly more valuable.
body_content: Daily Missions List (Checkbox items with XP rewards)
Badge Preview (Recently unlocked or next available)

learning_screen.mascot_role: Mascot (Happy pose) positioned near the top or floating over content with a speech bubble providing learning tips.
body_content: Lesson Title and visual Progress Indicator
XP Reward Indicator (Showing what will be earned)

quiz_screen.mascot_role: Dynamic positioning. Displays Happy/Celebrating pose for correct answers, Sad/Encouraging pose for incorrect answers. Must be tied to the state of the immediate feedback.
body_content: Immediate Feedback Banner (Overlay or inline message)
Power-ups Row (Skip, Retry) styled as floating action buttons or distinct pills

leaderboard_rewards_screen.header_elements: Centered Logo. Mascot (Trophy pose) prominently celebrating top users near the top of the layout.
body_content: Ranking List: Top 3 get premium visual treatments (glowing borders, larger avatars).
Current User Highlight: Sticky view at bottom or prominently highlighted within the list.
Badge Showcase Grid: Knowledge Badges, Social, Event, and Rare badges.
Rewards Section: Avatar customization store, Vouchers, and the Top Reward (AI Conference) showcased with the Impact Points gradient.

technical_instructions.file_extension: Use purely .js files for React Native Expo prototype. Do NOT use .tsx.
technical_instructions.image_handling: MUST use the Expo Image component from 'expo-image' for all mascot and logo assets to ensure proper caching and performance.
technical_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='home-tab-button', data-testid='quiz-answer-1').
technical_instructions.visual_hierarchy: Impact Points must ALWAYS look visually distinct and more valuable than XP. Use the pink/violet gradient and drop shadows for Impact Points, while keeping XP clean and blue.
technical_instructions.layout_grid: Adhere strictly to an 8pt grid system for all padding and margins (8, 16, 24, 32px).
